details: no_deprecated_dirs: moltbot/ directory still present (deprecated per governance docs). board/ directory still present with legacy eod output.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ contains active Python modules (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py and scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py reference Moltbot in code paths. board/eod/out/ JSON files reference Clawdbot/Moltbot. Excluded: reports/audit docs and docs/ that document removal.
